message.content:
@startuml
title "Omit Representation"

actor Client as Client1
actor Client2 as Client2

rectangle HeaderValue
    Header
    Value
    Preference-Applied
    return=minimal
end

rectangle Representation
    = Representation
end

rectangle HeaderValue
    Header
    Value
    Preference-Applied
    return=minimal
end

rectangle Representation
    = Representation
end

Client1 -->|PUT / POST / PATCH| Representation
Representation -->|204 No Content / 201 Created| Client2

@enduml
